concept.title: What Is AcmeDoc?
concept.shortdesc: AcmeDoc is a fictional documentation platform used throughout these labs to practice DITA-OT customization.

conbody.p: helps teams create, manage, and publish structured documentation. It supports multiple output formats including HTML5, PDF, and EPUB.
conbody.note: This is a note element. In Lab 1, you will style this as a blue callout box.
This is a tip element. Tips should appear with a green left border after your customization.
This is a warning element. Warnings should appear with an orange left border.
This is a caution element. Cautions should appear with a red left border.

ul.li: Content reuse via conref and keyref

ol.li: Author — write topics in DITA XML
Build — run DITA-OT to produce output
Publish — deploy to web, print, or help system
